rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited has been a constituent of the Carbon Clean 200TM by Corporate Knights & As You Sow for 7 years
rows.source_sentence: Carbon Clean 200TM by Corporate Knights & As You Sow • Constituent for 7 years

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited achieved a 13.1% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions intensity since 2019
rows.source_sentence: 13.1% Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions intensity reduction1 since 2019

rows.text: 63% of CapitaLand Investment Limited's global portfolio achieved green building certification
rows.source_sentence: 63% of global portfolio2 achieved green building certification

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited achieved a 20.5% reduction in water consumption intensity since 2019
rows.source_sentence: 20.5% water consumption intensity reduction1 since 2019

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited committed to Net Zero for Scope 1 and 2 by 2050
rows.source_sentence: Committed to Net Zero for Scope 1 and 2 by 2050

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited's carbon emissions target was validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)
rows.source_sentence: Carbon emissions target validated by Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited implemented a shadow internal carbon price as part of Environmental and Social Impact Assessment (ESIA)
rows.source_sentence: Implemented shadow internal carbon price as part of Environmental and Social Impact Assessment (ESIA)*

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited revised Scope 1 and 2 targets and validated by SBTi to the 1.5ºC scenario
rows.source_sentence: Revised Scope 1 and 2 targets and validated by SBTi to the 1.5ºC scenario**

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited published its first Climate Resilience Report in 2023, aligned to the recommendations of TCFD
rows.source_sentence: Published 1st Climate Resilience Report 2023 (aligned to the recommendations of TCFD)

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited pledged support for TCFD in 2019
rows.source_sentence: 2019 Pledged support for TCFD

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited aligned early to the Taskforce on Climate-related Financial Disclosure (TCFD)
rows.source_sentence: Early alignment to the Taskforce on Climate-related Financial Disclosure (TCFD)

rows.text: CapitaLand Investment Limited is committed to achieving Net Zero carbon emissions for Scope 1 and 2 by 2050
rows.source_sentence: CLI has committed to achieving Net Zero carbon emissions for Scope 1 and 2 by 2050

rows.text: CLI’s sustainability targets include carbon emissions reduction targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).
rows.source_sentence: Ambitious ESG targets have been set which include carbon emissions reduction targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).

rows.text: The Board discusses matters relating to sustainability risks and relevant performance metrics, which include CLI’s progress on achieving the carbon emissions reduction targets, green building certification, human capital development, stakeholders’ expectations on climate change, social impact and/or other matters.
rows.source_sentence: The Board discusses matters relating to sustainability risks and relevant performance metrics, which include CLI’s progress on achieving the carbon emissions reduction targets, green building certification, human capital development, stakeholders’ expectations on climate change, social impact and/or other matters.

rows.text: Transit to a low-carbon business, reduce energy consumption through improved energy efficiency and increase use of renewable energy.
rows.source_sentence: Transit to a low-carbon business, reduce energy consumption through improved energy efficiency and increase use of renewable energy.

rows.text: Reduce water consumption, reuse water and prevent water pollution, especially in countries where the availability of clean water and sanitation are of concern.
rows.source_sentence: Reduce water consumption, reuse water and prevent water pollution, especially in countries where the availability of clean water and sanitation are of concern.

rows.text: Achieve green building certification of its global operational portfolio by 2030.
rows.source_sentence: Achieve green building certification of its global operational portfolio by 2030.

rows.text: Strengthen CLI portfolio’s climate resilience by addressing climate-related risks and opportunities throughout the real estate life cycle.
rows.source_sentence: Strengthen CLI portfolio’s climate resilience by addressing climate-related risks and opportunities throughout the real estate life cycle.

rows.text: CLI continued to extend its disclosure of Scope 1 emissions on fugitive emissions from chiller top ups.
rows.source_sentence: CLI continued to extend its disclosure of Scope 1 emissions on fugitive emissions from chiller top ups.

rows.text: From 2023 to 2024, there was an increase in carbon emissions despite a decrease in energy usage.
rows.source_sentence: From 2023 to 2024, there was an increase in carbon emissions despite a decrease in energy usage.

rows.text: Increased use of renewable energy across CLI’s stabilised properties in 2024 led to only an insignificant increase in emissions intensity from 2023 to 2024, despite the larger increase in energy intensity from 2023 to 2024.
rows.source_sentence: Increased use of renewable energy across CLI’s stabilised properties in 2024 led to only an insignificant increase in emissions intensity from 2023 to 2024, despite the larger increase in energy intensity from 2023 to 2024.

rows.text: CLI’s decarbonisation plan is integrated in the entire real estate life cycle.
rows.source_sentence: CLI’s decarbonisation plan is integrated in the entire real estate life cycle.

rows.text: CLI’s 2030 SMP further outlines the targets and pathways for transition to a low-carbon business that is aligned with climate science.
rows.source_sentence: CLI’s 2030 SMP further outlines the targets and pathways for transition to a low-carbon business that is aligned with climate science.

rows.text: Climate change and emissions reduction are key and material ESG issues identified as relevant and critical for CLI.
rows.source_sentence: Climate change and emissions reduction are key and material ESG issues identified as relevant and critical for CLI.

rows.text: CLI has pledged its support for the recommendations by the TCFD since 2019 and has voluntarily published climate-related financial disclosures in its four key areas since 2017.
rows.source_sentence: CLI has pledged its support for the recommendations by the TCFD since 2019 and has voluntarily published climate-related financial disclosures in its four key areas since 2017.

rows.text: The third climate scenario analysis, published in 2024, was the widest in coverage and deepest in impact assessment considered scenarios based on the latest global and scientific developments (scenarios from 1.5̊ C to 3̊ C for current to long-term time frames), was published in its 2023 Climate Resilience Report (CRR).
rows.source_sentence: The third climate scenario analysis, published in 2024, was the widest in coverage and deepest in impact assessment considered scenarios based on the latest global and scientific developments (scenarios from 1.5̊ C to 3̊ C for current to long-term time frames), was published in its 2023 Climate Resilience Report (CRR).

rows.text: The analysis guides CLI in making informed decisions for its business with significant risk exposure, building resilience and reducing vulnerability of identified properties.
rows.source_sentence: The analysis guides CLI in making informed decisions for its business with significant risk exposure, building resilience and reducing vulnerability of identified properties.

rows.text: The 2023 CRR mentions mitigation measures which are part of CLI’s general strategy to decarbonise and transition to a lower carbon economy.
rows.source_sentence: The 2023 CRR mentions mitigation measures which are part of CLI’s general strategy to decarbonise and transition to a lower carbon economy.

rows.text: As one of the more significant risks, carbon price shifts are an area which CLI aims to address through decarbonisation initiatives which are part of the CLI 2030 SMP.
rows.source_sentence: As one of the more significant risks, carbon price shifts are an area which CLI aims to address through decarbonisation initiatives which are part of the CLI 2030 SMP.

rows.text: In addition, CLI has targets on energy efficiency intensity and renewable energy for its global property portfolio.
rows.source_sentence: In addition, CLI has targets on energy efficiency intensity and renewable energy for its global property portfolio.

rows.text: CLI supports low-carbon investments and factors climate-related costs and opportunities into its evaluation of new investments or capital expenditure.
rows.source_sentence: CLI supports low-carbon investments and factors climate-related costs and opportunities into its evaluation of new investments or capital expenditure.

rows.text: It does this through the incorporation of its shadow internal carbon price and application of its Return on Sustainability metric, which provides CLI the opportunity to build resilience throughout its operations as well as to future-proof its real estate portfolio.
rows.source_sentence: It does this through the incorporation of its shadow internal carbon price and application of its Return on Sustainability metric, which provides CLI the opportunity to build resilience throughout its operations as well as to future-proof its real estate portfolio.

rows.text: CLI implemented a shadow internal carbon price11 since 2021 to quantify climate-related risks and opportunities for its new investments.
rows.source_sentence: CLI implemented a shadow internal carbon price11 since 2021 to quantify climate-related risks and opportunities for its new investments.

rows.text: This metric aims to redirect investments towards lower-carbon solutions, and renewable energy projects across CLI’s businesses and operations.
rows.source_sentence: This metric aims to redirect investments towards lower-carbon solutions, and renewable energy projects across CLI’s businesses and operations.

rows.text: As such, returns on investments are assessed against environmental impacts such as carbon emission implications.
rows.source_sentence: As such, returns on investments are assessed against environmental impacts such as carbon emission implications.

rows.text: The assessment also covers performance metrics such as energy efficiency, as well as climate transition and physical risk and opportunity considerations.
rows.source_sentence: The assessment also covers performance metrics such as energy efficiency, as well as climate transition and physical risk and opportunity considerations.

rows.text: As part of its AEI and redevelopment projects, it would consider enhanced environmental performance efficiency initiatives including achieving green building certifications, which would help address transition risks such as carbon price shifts, customer expectation changes, and electricity price shifts.
rows.source_sentence: As part of its AEI and redevelopment projects, it would consider enhanced environmental performance efficiency initiatives including achieving green building certifications, which would help address transition risks such as carbon price shifts, customer expectation changes, and electricity price shifts.

rows.text: CLI’s 2030 Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions reduction targets were validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) to be in line with a 1.5°C trajectory, consistent with the goals of the Paris Agreement12.
rows.source_sentence: CLI’s 2030 Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions reduction targets were validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) to be in line with a 1.5°C trajectory, consistent with the goals of the Paris Agreement12.

rows.text: It aims to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% by 2030 from a 2019 base year13, and to reach Net Zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 205014.
rows.source_sentence: It aims to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% by 2030 from a 2019 base year13, and to reach Net Zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 205014.

rows.text: It is working towards updating its Scope 3 emissions target, aligned with climate science.
rows.source_sentence: It is working towards updating its Scope 3 emissions target, aligned with climate science.

rows.text: The company likely upholds strong business ethics through robust governance frameworks, board independence, and adherence to global standards, as evidenced by its consistent inclusion in leading sustainability indices and commitment to transparency.

The company likely promotes tenant sustainability through green lease agreements, active tenant engagement programs, and initiatives focused on tenant wellbeing, aligning with its broader sustainability goals and decarbonisation efforts.
